retrieved_result: Microchips now in production 27/05/2002At the beginning of March this year, the first microchip was dispatched from Grundfos’ sensor department in Farum to the electronics factory in Bjerringbro, where it was integrated in a pressure sensor. history.title: Microchips now in production
history.description: 27/05/2002At the beginning of March this year, the first microchip was dispatched from Grundfos’ sensor department in Farum to the electronics factory in Bjerringbro, where it was integrated in a pressure sensor. This was the start of theactual production of microchips – after approximately eighteen
